narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 3-F (precinct in Lorain County) has 708 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
